Taxonomy Kingdom Fungi      (
      1FUNGK      ) Phylum Ascomycota      (
      1ASCOP      ) Subphylum Pezizomycotina      (
      1PEZIQ      ) Class Dothideomycetes      (
      1DOTHC      ) Order Venturiales      (
      1VENTO      ) Family Venturiaceae      (
      1VENTF      ) Genus Venturia      (
      1VENTG      ) Species Venturia inaequalis      (
      VENTIN      )

seed.symptoms: Olive-green to brown velvety spots on leaves; scabby, cracked lesions on fruit surface; premature defoliation in severe cases.
seed.causes: Fungal pathogen Venturia inaequalis; spreads via ascospores during wet spring weather; overwinters in fallen infected leaves.
seed.treatment: Apply fungicides (myclobutanil, captan, or mancozeb) at early green tip stage; repeat every 7-14 days during wet periods.
seed.prevention: Remove and destroy fallen leaves; plant resistant cultivars (e.g., Liberty, Freedom); prune for canopy airflow.
